creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Keve Nagy from comment #61)

Q1, A1: This is not what I asked. I did not ask if there were any unexpected reboots or crashes. I did ask, when a subsequent poweroff without subsequent intervening reboot, that the machine rebooted instead of power off. Subsequent reboot works normally. Subsequent poweroff does not without a subsequent reboot first. I assume you have the same problem I do then (meaning this patch is not ready for commit).

Q2, A2: This is a problem. Was this on stable/14 or stable/13? It should not be enabled by default. It should be enabled only after enabling it.
